query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "infinite worlds with versatile interactions" computer science
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (d) as a foundational survey and category (f) as a canonical reference for the "versatile interactions" and "infinite worlds" (real-world simulation) aspects of the user's question, providing the necessary unified framework for multimodal generative models (2D to 4D) that would be expected in a literature review for extending this specific line of CS research.
